'''wazusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zaddy|zaddy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-z-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zaddy|zaddy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wazusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæzisith|wæzisith]] || [[word:wæzisij|wæzisij]] || [[word:wæzisish|wæzisish]] || [[word:wæzisi|wæzisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wazuzusuth|wazuzusuth]] || [[word:wazuzusuj|wazuzusuj]] || [[word:wazuzusush|wazuzusush]] || [[word:wazuzusu|wazuzusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wazusuth|wazusuth]] || [[word:wazusuj|wazusuj]] || [[word:wazusush|wazusush]] || [[word:wazusu|wazusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wazufsuth|wazufsuth]] || [[word:wazufsuj|wazufsuj]] || [[word:wazufsush|wazufsush]] || [[word:wazufsuf|wazufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wazusuthu|wazusuthu]] || [[word:wazusuju|wazusuju]] || [[word:wazusushu|wazusushu]] || [[word:wazusuku|wazusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wazusuth|wazusuth]] || [[word:wazusuj|wazusuj]] || [[word:wazusush|wazusush]] || [[word:wazusu|wazusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wazusuthul|wazusuthul]] || [[word:wazusujul|wazusujul]] || [[word:wazusushul|wazusushul]] || [[word:wazusukul|wazusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wazusuthuthu|wazusuthuthu]] || [[word:wazusujuju|wazusujuju]] || [[word:wazusushushu|wazusushushu]] || [[word:wazusuku|wazusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wazusuthun|wazusuthun]] || [[word:wazusujun|wazusujun]] || [[word:wazusushun|wazusushun]] || [[word:wazusukun|wazusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wazusuthuoro|wazusuthuoro]] || [[word:wazusujuoro|wazusujuoro]] || [[word:wazusushuoro|wazusushuoro]] || [[word:wazusukuoro|wazusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
